items.headline: RBI Governor Highlights Risks from West Asia Conflict and Weak Monsoon to India's Economic Growth
items.summary: RBI Governor Sanjay Malhotra noted strong macroeconomic fundamentals but warned of risks to economic growth from the West Asia conflict and potential weak monsoon. RBI projects 6.6% GDP growth for FY27.

items.headline: India's Retail Inflation Breaches RBI's Target, Rises to 4.38% in June
items.summary: Retail inflation rose to 4.38% in June (up from 3.93% in May), breaching RBI's 4% target due to higher fuel and food prices, influenced by US-Iran conflict and delayed rains. RBI raised FY27 inflation forecast to 5.1%.

items.headline: Economists Anticipate Rate Hike in FY27 as Inflation Concerns Mount
items.summary: Some economists expect a 25-50 basis point rate hike in FY27 due to inflation. However, an RBI MPC member suggested possible upward revision of growth and downward revision of inflation if oil prices stabilize and peace talks hold.

items.headline: Indian Equities Open Lower Amid Weak Global Cues and Middle East Tensions
items.summary: Indian equity benchmarks opened lower, reflecting cautious Asian markets and Japanese share losses due to escalating Middle East tensions. GIFT Nifty indicated a gap-down open for Nifty and Sensex.

items.headline: Brent Crude Surges Above $90 a Barrel on Renewed US-Iran Conflict, Raising India's Energy Shock Concerns
items.summary: Renewed US-Iran conflict pushed Brent crude prices above $90 a barrel, raising concerns about India's vulnerability to energy shocks, potential rupee depreciation, and impact on FPI flows.

items.headline: Weakening 'AI Trade' Globally Seen as Positive for India
items.summary: The weakening of the 'AI trade' in US, South Korea, and Taiwan markets is viewed as a positive development for India.

items.headline: FIIs Remain Net Sellers for Fourth Consecutive Session
items.summary: Foreign Institutional Investors (FIIs) have been net sellers for four consecutive trading sessions, while Domestic Institutional Investors (DIIs) continue to be buyers.

items.headline: Several Companies to Announce Q1 FY27 Results Today
items.summary: UltraTech Cement, Paytm, Bajaj Healthcare, BlueStone Jewellery, Canara HSBC Life Insurance, Indian Overseas Bank, Mahindra Logistics, Rallis, Shyam Metalics, Sobha, Transformers and Rectifiers, Tourism Finance Corp, and Venus Remedies are scheduled to announce Q1 FY27 results today.

items.headline: Reliance Industries Reports Strong Q1 FY27 Profit and Revenue Growth
items.summary: Reliance Industries (RIL) reported a 6.1% year-on-year (YoY) jump in net profit and a 24.5% YoY rise in revenue to ₹3.4 lakh crore for the June 2026 quarter.

items.headline: Axis Bank Posts 22.5% YoY Net Profit Increase in Q1 FY27 Despite Slight Rise in NPAs
items.summary: Axis Bank reported a 22.5% YoY increase in standalone net profit to ₹7,113.9 crore. Net interest income grew 8% YoY. Gross and net NPAs slightly rose quarter-on-quarter.

items.headline: Punjab National Bank Sees 214% YoY Surge in Q1 FY27 Net Profit
items.summary: Punjab National Bank (PNB) reported a 214% YoY surge in net profit to ₹5,253 crore. Net interest income increased by 2% YoY, and asset quality improved with declining NPAs.

items.headline: Poonawalla Fincorp Records Substantial Profit and NII Growth in Q1 FY27
items.summary: Poonawalla Fincorp saw a 391.5% YoY jump in consolidated net profit to ₹307.7 crore and an 87.2% YoY increase in net interest income to ₹1,196.8 crore in Q1 FY27.

items.headline: RBL Bank's Q1 FY27 Net Profit Rises 27% with Improved Asset Quality
items.summary: RBL Bank reported a 27% YoY rise in standalone net profit to ₹254 crore, with net interest income up 12% YoY. Asset quality improved with declining NPAs.

items.headline: HDFC AMC Reports Healthy Performance with 13% YoY QAAUM Growth in Q1 FY27
items.summary: HDFC Asset Management Company Ltd. (HDFC AMC) reported healthy performance in Q1FY27 with overall Quarterly Average Assets Under Management (QAAUM) growing 13% YoY.

items.headline: BHEL Reports Robust Q1 FY27 Performance
items.summary: Bharat Heavy Electricals Ltd. (BHEL) reported a robust performance for Q1 FY27.

items.headline: Most Sectoral Indices Decline in Early Trade Except IT and PSU Banks
items.summary: In early trade today, all sectoral indices declined except for IT and PSU banks. Last week, IT and Consumer sectors were top performers, while Capital Market, Tourism, and Realty were worst performers.

items.headline: IT and Consumer Sectors Outperform Last Week, Capital Market and Realty Lag
items.summary: Last week, the IT index rallied 4.2% and the Consumer index gained 2.9%, making them top performers. Conversely, Capital Market, Tourism, and Realty indices shed more than 2.5% each.

items.headline: Private Banks, Financial Services, Auto, IT, and Realty Lead Advance on Friday
items.summary: Private Banks, Financial Services, Auto, IT, and Realty sectors led the advance on Friday, while Pharma and Healthcare witnessed profit booking.

items.headline: Index Reshuffle Expected Following Torrent Pharma-J.B. Chemicals Merger
items.summary: Significant changes are expected in India's equity indices, effective from July 16, 2026, due to the merger of Torrent Pharmaceuticals and J.B. Chemicals & Pharmaceuticals. J.B. Chemicals & Pharma will be excluded from various Nifty indices, with Prime Focus and Grindwell Norton among replacements.

items.headline: Corporate Laws Amendment Bill 2026 to Reform Mergers, Buybacks, and Capital Structures
items.summary: The Corporate Laws Amendment Bill 2026 proposes significant changes impacting mergers, amalgamations, buy-back of securities, and related-party transactions. New amendments allow certain companies to maintain share capital in foreign currencies and restructure buyback approvals.

items.headline: India Inc. Sees Doubling of M&A Deal Value in Q2 2026 Driven by Large Overseas Acquisitions
items.summary: India Inc. recorded over double the M&A deal value in Q2 2026, reaching $36.3 billion, largely due to a few large overseas acquisitions like Sun Pharma's $11.75 billion acquisition of Organon & Co. The number of transactions decreased.

items.headline: Several Stocks to Trade Ex-Dividend Today, July 20
items.summary: Shares of Aditya Infotech, Acceleratebs India, Fairchem Organics, Graphite India, Happy Forgings, KPR Mill, NDR Auto Components, Nelcast, NESCO, Pokarna, Quest Capital Markets and SPR Auto Technologies will trade ex-dividend today. Acceleratebs India will issue a final dividend of Rs 0.10.

items.headline: Oil-Linked Stocks in Focus as Crude Prices Surge Above $90
items.summary: Oil-linked stocks are expected to be in focus as Brent crude prices climbed above $90 per barrel due to escalating US-Iran tensions.

items.headline: Banking Heavyweights in Focus Post Q1 FY27 Results
items.summary: HDFC Bank, ICICI Bank, Axis Bank, and Kotak Mahindra Bank are in focus following their Q1 FY27 results.

items.headline: Reliance Industries in Focus After Strong Q1 FY27 Earnings
items.summary: Reliance Industries (RIL) is in focus after reporting strong Q1 FY27 results.

items.headline: Power Grid Corporation Declared Successful Bidder for Fatehgarh-II Transmission Project
items.summary: Power Grid Corporation of India has been declared the successful bidder for the Fatehgarh-II Transmission Project.

items.headline: RailTel Corporation Discloses New Litigation with 3i Infotech
items.summary: RailTel Corporation of India disclosed a new litigation matter with 3i Infotech.

items.headline: Nuvama Wealth Management Receives SEBI Administrative Warning
items.summary: Nuvama Wealth Management received an administrative warning from SEBI.

items.headline: Companies Announcing Results Today: UltraTech Cement, Paytm, Indian Overseas Bank, Rallis India, Sobha
items.summary: UltraTech Cement, Paytm, Indian Overseas Bank, Rallis India, Sobha, and others are among the companies announcing results today.
